items.title: The Stock Market Has Done This Just 10 Times in 30 Years, and It May Signal a Big Move in 2025
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: The S&P 500 has returned over 20% in a calendar year just 10 times in the last 30 years. History suggests the index could advance another 15% in 2025, but investors should be cautious due to the market's elevated valuation.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions JPMorgan Chase's less optimistic forecast for the S&P 500 in 2025, but does not provide a strong opinion on the company itself.
